page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 64 physical cores using the x86_64 architecture, with 1.0 thread per core. The processor is an AMD EPYC 9T95 running at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz.

The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

The lack of hyperthreading means each vCPU has a dedicated physical core, which eliminates resource contention between threads but limits parallel thread density compared to SMT-enabled systems. This profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as large databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring high memory capacity per core.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per core ratio. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-based server allocates one thread per physical core. The instance includes a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. The high memory-to-CPU ratio and dedicated core allocation make it suitable for memory-intensive enterprise applications, in-memory databases, and caching layers that require predictable compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores, high memory density, and baseline network speeds of 32 Gbps.

512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor architecture without local storage or GPUs
Designed for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise workloads
